$comment: Single source of truth for the cross-SDK E2E. Every runner (Python, TS) loads e2e/fixtures/catalog.json, registers all tools, and asserts the behavior below. Because the Python and TS SDKs wrap the same Rust BM25 core, identical assertions here enforce cross-SDK parity: a divergence makes exactly one runner fail. Queries are written so each has an unambiguous top-1 match; assertions intentionally check top-1 (not full ordering) to stay robust to score ties while still catching real regressions, packaging breaks, and binding-load failures.

searches.query: read a file from local disk
list the entries of a directory
run a sql query against the postgres database

gatewaySearch.query: read a file from local disk
